name: novel
description: Structured long-form fiction workflow plugin with commands, skills, templates, scripts, and state-driven orchestration for root-level novel projects.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, draft, review, import, and manage long-form fiction with a root-level project layout
interface.longDescription: Use Novel to initialize or import a root-level novel project, plan arcs and chapter batches, draft or polish chapters, review consistency, run research, and keep project memory synchronized across project, cast, timeline, roadmap, and state files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Novel to initialize or import this novel project, choose the right $novel-* skill, and keep state, timeline, and character files updated.
